metadata.description: WarrantOS / claude-provenance: an in-session citation-provenance gate for AI-assisted writing. Every factual claim needs a source or an explicit [CITE NEEDED], logged to a portable ledger.

plugins.name: claude-provenance
plugins.description: Legacy v0.3 in-session citation Stop hook and slash commands (/provenance-report, /provenance-verify). The full WarrantOS pipeline (CLI, MCP server, four-state verdict, attestation) installs separately from PyPI as `warrantos`.
